content.en:
"The Supreme Legendary Body has finally mastered half of it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It's not a big improvement, but it's a good start for him.

I have to say that the end of the world is indeed very suitable for him, if he hadn't come to the end of the world, I'm afraid he would be far from reaching the current realm.

However, if you just practice in such a step-by-step manner, it will take a long time to control more than 30% of the Supreme Legendary Body, and if you control 10%, it will be even more difficult.

But if you want to become a half-step eternal master, it is so difficult, and you can almost only rely on a large number of years to survive.

At present, Ye Tian's growth speed is fast enough.

However, he wants to be faster, otherwise if he wants to control ten percent of the supreme legendary body, the hope is almost slim!

"It's good that the Half-Tooth Master can point me to the end of the realm, and I can't ask him for help anymore. "

"The next path of "753" can only rely on myself. "

During this time, Ye Tian also inquired a lot of information, such as controlling the Supreme Legend, and he focused on investigating.

Under normal circumstances, those fifth-level peak Legendary Realm lords who wanted to become half-step Eternal Masters would spend a long time controlling their Supreme Legendary Bodies step by step.

Either that, or to obtain some special treasure that will help speed up this control, but that kind of treasure is rare, and even the eternal master may not be able to get his hands on it, so once it appears, it will be used and cannot be traded at all.

Or let an eternal master personally guide you, spend a long time, step by step to teach you to control your own Supreme Legendary Body, or you can accelerate the control of the Supreme Legendary Body, but the effect is not necessarily good.

After all, other people's guidance, after all, is only guidance, and they can't accurately guide their own cultivation.

However, Ye Tian still heard a piece of news, but the truth was not very clear.

In the rumored world, there is a mysterious life that can easily control their supreme legendary body, thus reaching the realm of a half-step eternal master.

Like many Boundary River Beings in the Half-Step Eternal Master's Realm, they are born with a half-step Eternal Master, so they can inherently control their own supreme legendary bodies, but those mysterious lives are growing step by step from the lower Boundary River Beings, and their wisdom is also very high.

This kind of life even has a very high hope of becoming the eternal master.

However, the number of such beings is very small and cannot form a race, otherwise it would have been famous in the boundary river.

"This kind of mysterious life definitely has a special talent that can accelerate the control of its supreme legendary body. "

Ye Tian guessed.

If he can find this kind of special life, he can copy the talent in them and use it for himself.

The boundary river is too big, Ye Tian naturally won't blindly look for it, otherwise, with his speed, he doesn't know how many years it will take to find it.

So, Ye Tian was ready to spend some big money to buy intelligence.

There are also intelligence forces in the Jiehe, selling all kinds of information, and the biggest is the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce.

And in the Boundary God City, there is also a Boundary River Chamber of Commerce.

As a result, Ye Tian's duplicate body returned to the Boundary God City first and entered the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce.

A fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord of the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce received Ye Tian, and when Ye Tian proposed to investigate the mysterious Boundary River life, this lord of the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce offered a price.

"One hundred thousand realm river coins!"

This price is very high, but the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce has to put some thought into locking the location of that kind of Jiehe life.

Ye Tian didn't have any sense and paid this fee.

Then it's time to wait!

The ability of the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce is still very strong, and it didn't make Ye Tian wait too long, and a piece of information was sent to Ye Tian.

After Ye Tian checked it, he showed a look of joy.

There are a total of six special realm river life positions recorded on it, and all of them are half-step Eternal Masters realm.

Ye Tian was screened and selected one of the special boundary river lifeforms.

"Lord of Stone Mountain!"

This is a special Realm River life, when it was born, it was only comparable to the Legendary Realm Lord, and the growth rate was not fast, but after becoming the peak Legendary Realm Lord of the fifth level, it became a half-step Eternal Master Realm at an incomparably fast speed.

And now, it has at least seventy percent of the supreme legendary body, and it can be called invincible in the half-step eternal master level.

Fundamental information, the lord of Ishiyama is in the kendo abyss.

"Kendo Yuan, what a coincidence!"

Ye Tian took out the map given to him by the half-tooth master, and several places were given on it, one of which was Kendo Yuan.

The half-tooth master suggested that he go to Kendo Abyss in the future.

The Sword Dao Abyss is not a natural treasure land, but an abyss that has been slashed out of the boundary river by the sword of some eternal master.......... ，

There is still the aura of the eternal controller of the sword path in the sword path abyss, making it difficult for the fifth-level peak Legendary Realm lord to get close to the Sword Dao Abyss, and only the top-level fifth-level peak Legendary Realm lord has the strength to enter the Sword Dao Abyss.

But if you want to enter the depths of the Sword Dao Abyss, I'm afraid you need the top half-step Eternal Controller strength.

Even so, many Peak Legendary Realm Lords also want to enter the Sword Dao Abyss, because the Sword Dao Yuan contains the will of the eternal controller, and it can sharpen the will of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, although the effect is slow, but if you stay in the Sword Dao Abyss for a long time, the effect is also good.

Of course, the real great opportunity of Kendo Yuan is to comprehend kendo.

Kendo Yuan's kendo is the sword path created by the eternal master, and if he can comprehend it, he will hope to be accepted as a disciple by the other party.

That is not an ordinary Eternal Master, even the Half-Tooth Controller is inferior to the other party, that is the Eternal Controller who is really at the top, so countless peak Legendary Realm Lords have gone to the Sword Dao Abyss, even if they can't comprehend it, it's not bad to see it.

Ye Tian was originally going to become a half-step Eternal Master and go to the Sword Dao Yuan again to sharpen his will, and then to comprehend that person's Sword Dao, which would help improve his strength.

But now, he wanted to go early.

Wow!

Ye Tian's duplicate body didn't dare to hurry, and finally teleported to Kendao Yuan through the gates of the boundary rivers of the giant cities.

Boom 3.4!!!

The unimaginable sword power emanated unintentionally, all of which made Ye Tian feel a strong oppression.

If it weren't for the fact that his strength was already comparable to that of an ordinary half-step Eternal Master, it would really be very difficult to enter the Kendo Abyss.

I saw Ye Tian step into the sword path abyss, and under the oppression, he went deep into the sword path abyss step by step.

Along the way, he met a lot of Peak Legendary Realm Lords and Half-Step Eternal Masters, and almost all of them were half-step Eternal Masters in the back, because the fifth-level Peak Legendary Realm Lords could only stay at the edge of the Sword Dao Abyss.

While going deep into the Sword Dao Abyss, Ye Tian also opened the copying talent and looked for the Stone Mountain Lord he was looking for.

Finally, when Ye Tian's body was about to collapse, the copying talent detected the traces of the Lord of Stone Mountain. _
